metadata.description: Fluent — AI Language Learning Kit for Claude Code. Single-plugin marketplace hosting the fluent plugin.

plugins.name: fluent
plugins.description: Fluent — AI Language Learning Kit. Personal AI tutor for any target language (Dutch, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, and more). Uses spaced repetition (SM-2), active recall, adaptive difficulty, and progress tracking across 6 databases. Run /fluent-setup to onboard, then /fluent-learn, /fluent-vocab, /fluent-writing, /fluent-speaking, /fluent-reading, /fluent-review daily.
